summary: 9 film announcements, 6 TV announcements across 5 trades.

film.title: Renegades
film.talent: Jonathan Goldstein and John Francis Daley (directors)
film.announcement: Sony Pictures has landed the short story adaptation with Jonathan Goldstein and John Francis Daley set to direct the action-thriller feature.

film.title: The Bell Jar
film.announcement: Ella Beatty is in final talks to join Focus Features' adaptation of The Bell Jar.

film.title: Hollow
film.announcement: Sony has landed the Sleepy Hollow package with Sydney Sweeney starring, Lindsey Anderson Beer writing and directing, and LuckyChap producing.

film.title: If I Tell You
film.announcement: Tessa Blake's 'If I Tell You' starring Carol Kane has been acquired by Suncatcher Productions for distribution.

film.title: The Musical
film.talent: Rob Lowe, Will Brill, Gillian Jacobs (stars)
film.announcement: Blue Harbor and Variance have taken U.S. distribution rights to the Sundance pic 'The Musical' starring Rob Lowe, Will Brill and Gillian Jacobs.

film.title: Bender
film.talent: Bill Burr, Chris O'Dowd, Ruari Spooner (stars)
film.announcement: Ruari Spooner from 'Harry Potter' has joined Bill Burr and Chris O'Dowd in the comedy 'Bender'.

film.title: Mini War
film.talent: Brett Gelman, Kevin Nealon, Rob Morgan (cast)
film.announcement: Brett Gelman, Kevin Nealon and Rob Morgan have joined the 'Mini War' comedy.

film.title: How The Cookie Crumbles
film.talent: Giorgia Whigham, Trevor Wallace, Alyssa Milano, Shea Whigham (leads)
film.announcement: Giorgia Whigham, Trevor Wallace, Alyssa Milano and Shea Whigham lead the R-rated comedy 'How The Cookie Crumbles'.

film.title: The Drill
film.announcement: Rowan Blanchard has been cast to star in the school shooting-themed dark comedy 'The Drill' from director Millicent Hailes.

tv.title: Thunder Road
tv.announcement: West Duchovny has joined AMC's NASCAR drama series 'Thunder Road'.

tv.title: This Summer Will Be Different
tv.talent: Roby Attal, Francesca Reale (cast as Felix and Bridget)
tv.announcement: Roby Attal and Francesca Reale have joined Netflix's 'This Summer Will Be Different' as Felix and Bridget.

tv.title: God of War
tv.announcement: Prime Video's 'God of War' series will recast the lead Kratos role after Ryan Hurst suffered an injury on set.

tv.title: Jakarta
tv.announcement: Iko Uwais and Albert Hughes have united for the multi-generational crime series 'Jakarta' at Alcon Entertainment.

tv.title: Queenstown
tv.announcement: Netflix has unveiled 'Queenstown,' its first New Zealand series.

tv.title: The Ultimate Self-Defense Championship
tv.announcement: The Ultimate Self-Defense Championship is launching a female-focused spinoff series on YouTube.
